lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Rin
lines.text: Can I help you [TzHaar caste]-[player name]?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Rin
lines.text: Are you not [TzHaar caste]-[player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's a '[TzHaar caste]'?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Rin
lines.text: That what you are... you tough and strong no?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Rin
lines.text: That what you are... you user of mystic powers no?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Rin
lines.text: That what you are... you agile and quick no?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Rin
lines.text: That what you are... you skilled at making things no?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well yes I suppose I am...

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Rin
lines.text: Then you [TzHaar caste]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you then?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Rin
lines.text: Silly JalYt, I am TzHaar-Hur, one of the crafters for this city.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Rin
lines.text: There are the wise TzHaar-Mej who guide us, the mighty TzHaar-Ket who guard us, and the swift TzHaar-Xil who hunt for our food.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for explaining it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess so...

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Rin
lines.text: Well then, no problems.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No I'm not!

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Rin
lines.text: What ever you say, crazy JalYt!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No I'm fine thanks.

sections.title: Catching the player trying to steal from their stalls

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Rin
lines.text: No no no! TzHaar-Hur-Rin not approve. Hands off.

sections.title: Interacting with them after stealing from their stalls recently

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Rin
lines.text: You are bad JalYt. You stole from this store.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Rin
lines.text: TzHaar-Ket!
